### Presidential helicopter welding failure
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "Presidential helicopter welding failure"
- **Anchor:** `§4.p5`
- **Quote (layer 3):** "The other news in all this is that the Blackhawk at the time was not only part of the Air Force, the Navy, the Coast Guard, and the Army — it was also the presidential helicopter. So they could have lost the president's helicopter because of this little engineering fiasco.

## §5. Modern wing alloys and stretch stress relief [10:28]"
